title: The Heart Dances - the journey of The Piano: the ballet
original_title: The Heart Dances - The Journey of The Piano: The Ballet
overview: This elegant new film from the director of Crossing Rachmaninoff takes us backstage at the Royal New Zealand Ballet as a brilliantly theatrical European interpretation of a New Zealand classic re-enters the culture that inspired it.
